description_long: This bungalow features a two-story design with a prominent, wide, red-tiled hip roof and multiple overhanging eaves. The exterior walls are constructed from a combination of brick and concrete, with large glass windows dominating the lower level, allowing for ample natural light. The front facade includes a covered porch supported by sturdy columns, providing a sheltered entryway. The upper story is set back, creating a stepped appearance and additional roof terraces. The building sits on a green lawn base, with brickwork skirting the lower perimeter. The overall style is modern with clean lines, geometric forms, and a focus on horizontal elements.
description: A modern two-story bungalow with a wide red-tiled hip roof, large glass windows, and a covered porch supported by columns. The exterior combines brick, concrete, and glass for a clean, geometric look.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the front facade with the main entrance, large glass windows, and the covered porch supported by columns.
description_view_1: View 1 highlights the side of the bungalow, revealing the depth of the porch and the arrangement of windows along the side wall.
description_view_2: View 2 displays the rear of the bungalow, with fewer windows and a more solid brick and concrete wall, as well as the stepped roof structure.
description_view_3: View 3 presents the opposite side, emphasizing the wide hip roof and the upper story's setback, with visible support columns and window groupings.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped front and side windows
